name: Hazelnut Apple Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Hazelnuts, toasted and finely ground
1 large Granny Smith Apple, peeled and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Toast hazelnuts on a baking sheet until golden brown; remove hulls.
3. Grind the toasted hazelnuts into a fine meal.
4. In a large bowl, mix together flour, ground hazelnuts, baking powder, baking soda, applesauce, egg beaters, milk, and vanilla until well combined.
5. Gently fold in diced apple (or preferred fruit).
6. Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat. Pour batter to form desired pancake size.
7. Cook until bubbles appear on the surface, then flip pancakes.
8. Bake for an additional 1-2 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and cooked through.
9. Serve warm with your favorite toppings.
Makes about a dozen pancakes. Enjoy!
